caption: A person's hands are shown opening a box of Topps "CLEARLY AUTHENTIC 2020" trading cards on a black surface. In the initial frames, the person peels back the clear plastic shrink wrap from the top of the box. As the sequence progresses, the person reaches inside the box to pull out a wrapped pack of cards. A prominent orange and white logo for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS" is visible across the bottom of the screen. In the upper right and lower right corners, a small inset video window shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a white baseball cap sitting at a desk with computer equipment. The background behind the box is a plain white wall. The scene transitions from the initial act of unwrapping the outer box to the retrieval of an individual pack of cards.
